overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a post-apocalyptic rural landscape at dusk. The character travels along a dirt path from an inland forest area to a riverside with a makeshift camp visible across the water, then continues along the shore before turning back inland along a fenced trail.

events.description: character turns left toward the river, changing direction from straight to angled left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path between trees, heading toward a river visible in the distance

entered.detail: worn dirt trail with patches of dry grass
tall deciduous tree with thick trunk
large forested mountain rising in the background
dry grass and low shrubs lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a forested area with mountains visible in the distance. The path is surrounded by trees and dry grass as the character moves forward through the overcast landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside trail with distant makeshift camp

events.description: emerges from dense tree cover to open riverside, water becomes visible on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank with a large gnarled tree on the left and a makeshift camp visible across the water

entered.detail: calm river with dark reflective surface
massive twisted tree trunk with exposed roots at the water's edge
makeshift shelters with blue tarps visible on the opposite bank
scattered rocks and pebbles along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a riverbank where the character walks alongside calm water. A large gnarled tree stands prominently on the left while blue tarp shelters of a makeshift camp are visible across the river against the mountain backdrop.

events.description: character turns right away from the river, heading back toward inland forest path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank before turning away from the water toward a wooded area with a wooden fence

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running parallel to the path
large boulder formation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the shore as dusk deepens and light fades, then turns away from the river toward an inland path. A wooden fence and large rock formations come into view as the water recedes from sight.

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence on the left and rocky terrain on the right, heading deeper into the forest as night approaches

entered.detail: leafless dead tree with twisted branches
scattered rocks and uneven ground beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a fenced dirt trail through increasingly dark woodland as dusk settles into night. The wooden fence runs along the left side while rocks and sparse vegetation line the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural post-apocalyptic landscape that transitions from an overcast forest to a riverside at dusk and finally into a darkening woodland. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail through a forested area with distant mountains visible under a gray sky. As the path opens up, the scene shifts to a riverbank where the character walks beside calm water, passing a large gnarled tree while blue tarp shelters of a makeshift camp appear across the river. The camera then follows the character along the shore as the light fades, before turning away from the water toward an inland path marked by wooden fences and large rock formations. Finally, the movement proceeds along this fenced trail as the deepening dusk settles into night, surrounding the path with increasingly dark woods and sparse vegetation.
